guidance.empathy_line: I'm sorry to hear that — your feedback genuinely helps us improve NexaFi.
proposed_fixes: We recently launched a redesigned dashboard — try switching to it in Settings > Display.
Our AI insights feature can be personalized to your investing style in Profile > Preferences.
If there's a specific feature you feel is missing, our product team reviews all feedback submitted via Help > Suggest a Feature.
guidance.follow_up_question: Could you share what specifically isn't working for you? That helps us point you to the right solution or pass your feedback to the team.

title: User finds the app too expensive

guidance.empathy_line: We hear you — cost is a real consideration and we want to make sure you're getting value.
proposed_fixes: Our free tier includes portfolio tracking and basic AI insights with no subscription required.
The Pro plan at $9/month includes unlimited AI analysis, tax-loss harvesting alerts, and priority support.
Annual billing saves 20% compared to monthly — you can switch in Settings > Billing.
We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you feel the Pro plan isn't right for you.
guidance.follow_up_question: Are you currently on the free or Pro plan? I can help you find the right fit.

title: User wants to cancel or delete account

guidance.empathy_line: I understand, and I want to make sure you have all the information before making that decision.
proposed_fixes: You can downgrade to our free plan instead of canceling — you keep your portfolio history and data.
If there's a specific issue driving this, our support team can often resolve it quickly.
If you do decide to close your account, you can export all your data first from Settings > Data Export.
guidance.follow_up_question: Is there a specific reason you're considering leaving? I'd love to help if there's something we can fix.

guidance.empathy_line: That's fair feedback — AI tools should earn your trust, not just claim it.
proposed_fixes: Nova's insights improve with more context about your goals — try updating your investor profile in Settings > Profile.
You can rate any response with a thumbs down to help us improve the model.
For complex questions, try being more specific — e.g. 'Why is NVDA down this week?' vs 'What's happening with stocks?'
guidance.follow_up_question: Can you share an example of a response that felt off? That helps us improve directly.

guidance.empathy_line: I appreciate you being upfront — let me make sure you have the full picture before you decide.
proposed_fixes: NexaFi's AI copilot goes beyond basic robo-advising — it explains the 'why' behind every recommendation in plain language.
We offer free account transfers (ACATS) from most brokerages — no fees to move your portfolio to NexaFi.
If a competitor offers a specific feature you need, tell us — our product team actively builds based on user requests.
We can match or beat most competitor pricing for annual Pro subscribers — contact support to discuss.
guidance.follow_up_question: Which platform are you considering and what's drawing you to it? I may be able to show you how NexaFi compares.

title: User lost money and blames the app

guidance.empathy_line: I'm truly sorry about your losses — that's genuinely stressful and I want to address this carefully.
proposed_fixes: NexaFi provides educational insights and analysis, not personalized financial advice — all investment decisions are yours to make.
We can review your portfolio together to understand what happened and identify any adjustments going forward.
If you believe a specific feature or data error contributed to a loss, please document it and contact our support team — we take these reports seriously.
Consider speaking with a licensed financial advisor for personalized guidance on recovering from losses.
guidance.follow_up_question: Can you walk me through what happened? I want to understand the situation fully before responding.

title: User wants a feature that doesn't exist

guidance.empathy_line: That's great feedback — the best features we've built came directly from users like you.
proposed_fixes: Submit your feature request via Help > Suggest a Feature — our product team reviews every submission.
Check our public roadmap at nexafi.com/roadmap to see if your request is already planned.
Many power features are available in the Pro plan — it's possible what you're looking for already exists.
Join our beta program at nexafi.com/beta to get early access to features in development.
guidance.follow_up_question: What feature are you looking for? I can check if it's on our roadmap or already available in a different part of the app.
